icps.why: Small and mid-size independent grocery stores buy from distributors rather than direct from manufacturers. High volume of potential accounts in every metro market.
icps.value_prop: Competitive bulk pricing, reliable weekly delivery, national brand selection, flexible order minimums, dedicated account rep

icps.why: Corner stores, bodegas, and c-stores need reliable wholesale supply for snacks, candy, dry goods, and beverages. Massive addressable market.
icps.value_prop: Top-selling national brands, candy and snack variety packs, fast restock, no minimum headaches, weekly delivery routes

icps.why: Regional supermarket chains and larger grocery retailers need volume supply of national brands at competitive wholesale pricing.
icps.value_prop: Volume bulk discounts, full catalog of national brands, dedicated account manager, reliable logistics, category management support

icps.why: Dollar stores and discount retailers carry grocery and confectionery items and need the lowest wholesale cost to protect thin margins.
icps.value_prop: Lowest wholesale cost on confectionery and dry goods, case-break options, consistent supply, margin-friendly pricing

icps.why: Gas station mini-marts stock snacks, candy, and dry goods. High turnover on impulse items means frequent reorder cycles.
icps.value_prop: Snacks, candy, and impulse buy inventory, fast turnaround on reorders, compact case sizes for limited shelf space

icps.why: International grocery stores and specialty food markets can complement their specialty inventory with recognizable national brands customers expect.
icps.value_prop: Complement specialty items with national brands, broad dry goods and confectionery catalog, reliable supply chain

icps.why: Potential B2B partnerships with other distributors for cross-selling. They may not carry the same national brand dry goods and confectionery lines.
icps.value_prop: Cross-selling partnership, fill gaps in their catalog with national brand dry goods and confectionery, wholesale-to-wholesale pricing

icps.why: Restaurant supply companies serve overlapping customer bases and might add grocery wholesale lines or refer retail clients.
icps.value_prop: Partnership opportunity, extend your offering with grocery wholesale lines, shared customer referrals
